en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 6

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 6
Top Question of the Week
How high will ETH go this month?

Since 2018 so many of us have been waiting for this moment. It’s been a long ride through crypto winter and it’s never to say that those lonely ski slopes won’t come again, but, I think we can all agree that this time the price action is for slightly different reasons. People are starting to see just how important web3 and decentralisation actually are for all of our futures.

It’s not just about shilling a coin for a quick pump and dump like we saw in the last altcoin rally and ICO era. Now, the term “blockchain” is starting to move away from that buzzword that it was so often described as throughout 2019/2020, to actually being in sync to how we realise the potential of a truly accessible, open, broadly distributed ecosystem that isn’t just a front for the top 1%.

Ethereum will continue to lead the pack for web3, because, despite what some may be led to believe by flashy headlines and loud web2 voices, Ethereum is really the only truly authentic blockchain and decentralised infrastructure out there. Others, although doing interesting things in the space, do not hold the same sincerity in the actual mission of what an open sourced decentralised commercial environment means.
Most Common Repeat Questions
Why has it taken 9 months for PODE to solve all of my problems in life?
Let’s address this in full. First off, 9 months ago DIGITALAX didn’t even exist. It was merely an idea on a google doc on my laptop.

We understand that there is a mix of views in the PODE community about how wonderful or awful it is. But it would be really great if people could at least get their basic facts straight. It would make it easier to believe that those few that do have a negative view are actually being sincere in their commentary.

The first simplest fact to verify can be looked up by anyone on Etherscan . PODE launched December 21st, 2020. Since then we have been extremely active in our communication. I invite anyone to sit in a room and deal with the kind of insults and toxicity that our team and many others in this industry encounters on a daily basis and see how long they can put up with it. As it is, we are far more communicative and responsive than the vast majority of projects that put out a blog post once a week or have layers of staff members in between the founder, core team and the public. We have been active in addressing the PODE questions, comments and concerns throughout the 4 months. It seems that only some choose to properly read what is put out or scroll up through chats. We provide a substantial amount of information, but it is up to you whether or not you read and consider it.
So, let’s go through the rest of the facts from the top once again;

What was promised at the start: a lifetime of access to select digital experiences and events, along with related NFTs, for relevant opportunities that DIGITALAX brings forth. The first PODE related release was conceived and developed with a lot of hard work, as a means to enable digital fashion virtual experiences with a partner that ended up not delivering. In fact, they completely dropped the ball, and it was left for us to pick up the pieces. From here it was understood that if we are going to do this the right way and ensure that the vision is seen all the way through to the right outcomes, then depending on 3rd party partnerships that might or might not live up to expectations isn’t a tenable way to achieve the pace and quality of work DIGITALAX adheres to. Therefore, we started intensive development entirely in house for each of the two subsequent drops that reinforced our ecosystem and what we are building as a whole.

At DIGITALAX we go back to base principles and we solve the hardest problems first. There’s nothing that we do that doesn’t deliberately feed back into everything else, even if it may not be obvious quickly, or to all. However, given the strident response from some members of the community against the core of the roadmap we had planned — instantly jumping to conclusions without giving consideration, time, or space for any development to play out — we decided to iterate and adjust course for the next drop, only to meet the same response.
This time, we are doing it different.

Our priority is to deliver a high quality set of experiences, within a broader framework that can grow sustainably throughout the lifetime of the community, created entirely in house, developed properly with the time and resources that it takes, and delivering recurring value for those who choose actively to participate in a healthy ecosystem. In direct response to those who don’t align with this roadmap and have called for a way out, we are also creating an exit path where none previously existed. This way we can part ways with those who whether through mistake, confusion, or even occasionally through malice are not a fit with the PODE community, as we move forward with those who truly believe in the transformative mission PODE exists to make real.

We put a lot of resources into the development of PODE, and we take our treasury allocation and management seriously. The future of PODE supports and is supported by other parts of the ecosystem, and that too takes time to achieve.

Ultimately, it is up to you to self identify as a supporter or opponent of PODE’s mission and values, as well as whether to stay or go. Our focus will remain on communicating and building an architecture for this core component of truly web3 native digital experiences and events, through indie gaming, modding, digital fashion, and the metaverse.
Top Controversies in the Industry

Yesterday the Rari protocol suffered an exploit with over $10m stolen from the REPT pool. It seems like the past week has been a REKT week for DeFi with a number of projects falling victims to various hacks, like that of Alpha Finance and EasyFi.

You can see Rari co-founder Jai’s composed response to the hack below. However, the controversy with this story comes from the point that some seem to believe that hack was in retaliation to a recently released article by The Defiant describing the Rari team as ‘ teens controlling a multi-million DeFi protocol’ where Jai exclaims that the project/team is “now… a fucking bank and that’s so fucking cool.”
You can also read more here:
Silly Fails and Trolling
I’m sure we all tuned in to Elon Musk’s debut SNL appearance. I have to say I commend him for everything that he has done.
The only troll is for those that thought the SNL appearance would pump $DOGE to a dollar during the broadcast. Instead, there was a massive sell off.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/digitalax _/

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 6

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 6
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
ازاي high will ETH go this month?

Since 2018 so many من us have been waiting لـ this moment. It’s been a long ride through crypto winter و it’s never الى say that those lonely ski slopes won’t come again, but, I think we can all agree that this time ال price action is لـ slightly different reasons. People are starting الى see just ازاي important web3 و decentralisation actually are لـ all من our futures.

It’s not just about shilling a coin لـ a quick pump و dump like we saw في ال last altcoin rally و ICO era. Now, ال term “blockchain” is starting الى move away من that buzzword that it was so often described as throughout 2019/2020, الى actually being في sync الى ازاي we realise ال potential من a truly accessible, open, broadly distributed النظام that isn’t just a front لـ ال top 1%.

Ethereum will continue الى lead ال pack لـ web3, because, despite what some may be led الى believe by flashy headlines و loud web2 voices, Ethereum is really ال only truly authentic blockchain و decentralised infrastructure out there. Others, although doing interesting things في ال space, do not hold ال same sincerity في ال actual mission من what an open sourced decentralised commercial environment means.
Most الاسئلة المتكررة
ليه has it taken 9 months لـ PODE الى solve all من my problems في life?
Let’s address this في full. First off, 9 months ago DIGITALAX didn’t even exist. It was merely an idea على a google doc على my laptop.

We understand that there is a mix من views في ال PODE المجتمع about ازاي wonderful or awful it is. But it would be really great if people could at least get their basic facts straight. It would make it easier الى believe that those few that do have a negative view are actually being sincere في their commentary.

ال first simplest fact الى verify can be looked up by anyone على Etherscan . PODE launched December 21st, 2020. Since then we have been extremely active في our communication. I invite anyone الى sit في a room و deal مع ال kind من insults و toxicity that our team و many others في this industry encounters على a daily basis و see ازاي long they can put up مع it. As it is, we are far more communicative و responsive than ال vast majority من projects that put out a blog بوست once a اسبوع or have layers من staff members في between ال founder, core team و ال public. We have been active في addressing ال PODE اسئلة, comments و concerns throughout ال 4 months. It seems that only some choose الى properly read what is put out or scroll up through chats. We provide a substantial amount من information, but it is up الى you whether or not you read و consider it.
So, let’s go through ال rest من ال facts من ال top once again;

What was promised at ال start: a lifetime من access الى select ديجيتال experiences و events, along مع related NFTs, لـ relevant opportunities that DIGITALAX brings forth. ال first PODE related release was conceived و developed مع a lot من hard work, as a means الى enable ديجيتال فاشون virtual experiences مع a partner that ended up not delivering. في fact, they completely dropped ال ball, و it was left لـ us الى pick up ال pieces. من here it was understood that if we are going الى do this ال right way و ensure that ال vision is seen all ال way through الى ال right outcomes, then depending على 3rd party partnerships that might or might not live up الى expectations isn’t a tenable way الى achieve ال pace و quality من work DIGITALAX adheres الى. Therefore, we started intensive development entirely في house لـ each من ال two subsequent drops that reinforced our النظام و what we are building as a whole.

At DIGITALAX we go back الى base principles و we solve ال hardest problems first. There’s nothing that we do that doesn’t deliberately feed back into everything else, even if it may not be obvious quickly, or الى all. However, given ال strident response من some members من ال المجتمع against ال core من ال roadmap we had planned — instantly jumping الى conclusions without giving consideration, time, or space لـ any development الى play out — we decided الى iterate و adjust course لـ ال next drop, only الى meet ال same response.
المرة دي إحنا بنعملها بشكل مختلف.

Our priority is الى deliver a high quality set من experiences, within a broader framework that can grow sustainably throughout ال lifetime من ال المجتمع, created entirely في house, developed properly مع ال time و resources that it takes, و delivering recurring value لـ those who choose actively الى participate في a healthy النظام. في direct response الى those who don’t align مع this roadmap و have called لـ a way out, we are also creating an exit path where none previously existed. This way we can part ways مع those who whether through mistake, confusion, or even occasionally through malice are not a fit مع ال PODE المجتمع, as we move forward مع those who truly believe في ال transformative mission PODE exists الى make real.

We put a lot من resources into ال development من PODE, و we take our treasury allocation و management seriously. ال future من PODE supports و is supported by other parts من ال النظام, و that too takes time الى achieve.

Ultimately, it is up الى you الى self identify as a supporter or opponent من PODE’s mission و values, as well as whether الى stay or go. Our focus will remain على communicating و building an architecture لـ this core component من truly web3 native ديجيتال experiences و events, through indie gaming, modding, ديجيتال فاشون, و ال metaverse.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

Yesterday ال Rari بروتوكول suffered an exploit مع over $10m stolen من ال REPT pool. It seems like ال past اسبوع has been a REKT اسبوع لـ DeFi مع a number من projects falling victims الى various hacks, like that من Alpha Finance و EasyFi.

You can see Rari co-founder Jai’s composed response الى ال hack below. However, ال controversy مع this story comes من ال point that some seem الى believe that hack was في retaliation الى a recently released article by ال Defiant describing ال Rari team as ‘ teens controlling a multi-million DeFi بروتوكول’ where Jai exclaims that ال project/team is “now… a fucking bank و that’s so fucking cool.”
تقدر كمان تقرأ أكتر من هنا:
Silly Fails و Trolling
I’m sure we all tuned في الى Elon Musk’s debut SNL appearance. I have الى say I commend him لـ everything that he has done.
ال only troll is لـ those that thought ال SNL appearance would pump $DOGE الى a dollar during ال broadcast. Instead, there was a massive sell off.
If you would like a سؤال answered or contribute content الى next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server في #FUD-FAQ channel!
